caption_text: Close call and wildly impressed more girl hung onto this landing! So proud ❤️

The truth is, even the best athletes in the world struggle too. They just refuse to let it be the reason they stop.

Whether you’re in Brisbane or anywhere else in the world, HYROX gives you that same chance: a moment to find out what you do when it gets tough.

caption_text: Another amazing surf trip with my kids. Always a big dream of mine to be able to check the forecast, pack the bags and Chase some surf with them. I’ll never take it for granted. It felt like overnight things went from me teaching them to surf to them making me feel completely inadequate as they dominate the lineup with such confidence! 😂🤙 massive thank you to @1hotel.hanaleibay for taking care of us
They’re good at this game. #Crime101 is #1 worldwide on @primevideo.

Excited to announce Crime 101 launching on Amazon Prime April 1st! Grateful for all the incredible support and feedback that’s come in so far for Crime 101. It means the world to see it resonate with you all.

Huge thanks to everyone who’s watched, shared, and shown love so far, couldn’t do it without you.

#Crime101 is streaming on @primevideo Video April 1st.

@bartfromraw @halleberry @markruffalo @monicabarbaro @coreyhawkins @amazonmgmstudios @wildstateprod @rawtvltd @workingtitlefilms @primevideo @crime101film
He always has an exit. Crime 101, streaming on Prime Video April 1.
